case_title: LS 194, LLC VS. WILLIAM G CLARKE ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, WILLIAM G

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LS 194, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARKE, WILLIAM G THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 196 GUERRERO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
